description_long: This is a single-story suburban house with a brick exterior and a dark gray, multi-gabled roof. The house features large, grid-pane windows on the front and sides, allowing for ample natural light. A driveway leads to an attached garage on the right side, while a short walkway connects the main entrance to the street. The landscaping includes several medium-sized deciduous trees and neatly trimmed grass patches around the perimeter. The overall structure is rectangular with protruding sections, giving it a modern yet classic residential appearance. The entryway is slightly recessed and framed by windows, providing a welcoming focal point.
description: A single-story brick house with a dark gray gabled roof, large grid-pane windows, an attached garage, and landscaped with trees and grass.
description_view_0: Rear-side view showing the back of the house, a walkway, and three trees behind the structure.
description_view_1: Direct front view highlighting the symmetrical window arrangement, main entrance, and two trees flanking the house.
description_view_2: Opposite rear-side view with a clear look at the side wall, two trees in the foreground, and the walkway extending to the street.
description_view_3: Angled front view displaying the garage, driveway, main entrance, and four surrounding trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a single door, flanked by large grid-pane windows, accessed by a short walkway and no visible porch or columns.
